title: Workflow import fails due to foreign key constraint
symptom: When attempting to import workflows in n8n v1.123.6, an error occurs stating 'SQLITE_CONSTRAINT: FOREIGN KEY constraint failed'. This prevents successful workflow imports.
applies_when: Importing workflows from a previous version
root_cause: The issue arises from changes in how active workflow versions are managed in n8n v1.123.6, leading to foreign key constraints that block the import of workflows that reference non-existent versions.
fix_steps: Upgrade n8n to version 2.3.4 or later
Retry importing the workflows after the upgrade
agent_instruction: Upgrade n8n to version 2.3.4 to resolve the workflow import issue.
